label: Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms

node.label: Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms
node.definition: Order or geometric relationships are injected into attention and sequence models.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms is to connect Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention to downstream capabilities including Transformers, Graph transformers.
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention.

dependencies.rationale: Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms uses Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Self-attention.
Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms uses Geometry, topology & symmetry as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

sentence_units.text: Order or geometric relationships are injected into attention and sequence models.

The role of Relative position, RoPE, ALiBi & coordinate mechanisms is to connect Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention to downstream capabilities including Transformers, Graph transformers.

Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Self-attention.
